name: roses-indoor-designs
description: Local-first 2D and 3D interior planning studio for Rose's Indoor Designs.

scripts.test: cmd /c npm run check && cmd /c npm run lint && cmd /c npm run format && cmd /c npm run validate:version && cmd /c npm run validate:manifest && cmd /c npm run validate:asset-sizes && cmd /c npm run validate:asset-sources && cmd /c npm run validate:static-a11y && cmd /c npm run validate:text-encoding && cmd /c npm run validate:dev-mode && cmd /c npm run validate:github-templates && cmd /c npm run validate:workflow && cmd /c npm run validate:docs && cmd /c npm run validate:structure && cmd /c npm run validate:global-bridge && cmd /c npm run validate:css && cmd /c npm run validate:html-safety && cmd /c npm run validate:storage-keys && cmd /c npm run validate:inline-handlers && cmd /c npm run validate:error-handling && cmd /c npm run validate:runtime-modules && cmd /c npm run validate:dependencies && cmd /c npm run validate:cloud-boundary && cmd /c npm run validate:clean-ignore && cmd /c npm run validate:project-schema && cmd /c npm run validate:app-state && cmd /c npm run validate:geometry && cmd /c npm run validate:3d-lifecycle && cmd /c npm run validate:export-filenames && cmd /c npm run test:self
scripts.lint: eslint scripts/main.js scripts/core/**/*.js scripts/ui/**/*.js scripts/planner2d/**/*.js scripts/planner3d/**/*.js scripts/export/**/*.js scripts/cloud/**/*.js scripts/devtools/**/*.mjs
scripts.format: prettier --check README.md CHANGELOG.md ROADMAP.md KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.md docs/**/*.md .github/**/*.md eslint.config.js scripts/main.js scripts/core/**/*.js scripts/ui/**/*.js scripts/planner2d/**/*.js scripts/planner3d/**/*.js scripts/export/**/*.js scripts/cloud/**/*.js scripts/devtools/**/*.mjs tests/**/*.mjs playwright.config.mjs package.json
